Actions.Text: REFERRED TO HOUSING, CONSTRUCTION AND COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT

Title: Increases penalties for owners of rent-regulated property who overcharge tenants
Summary: Increases penalties for owners of rent-regulated property who overcharge tenants.
LawCode: Amd §12, Emerg Ten Prot Act of 1974; amd §26-516, NYC Ad Cd
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the emergency tenant protection act of nineteen seventy-four, and the administrative code of the city of New York, in relation to increasing penalties for owners of rent-regulated property who overcharge tenants
